name: Colgate University
meets_full_need_notes: Colgate meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Colgate includes loans in financial aid packages, though loan amounts are modest. Colgate has a loan cap policy reducing loans for lower-income students. No full loan elimination as of 2025-26.

merit_thresholds.notes: Colgate offers merit scholarships including National Merit and Colgate-sponsored awards. Most prominent need-based; merit awards exist but are limited in number.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid as RD. Binding commitment may be rescinded if financial aid package is inadequate.
appeal_policy: Colgate reviews appeals for changed financial circumstances. Contact Office of Financial Aid with documentation.
